title: TilesCreateCraft
description: Small, Create-based modpack for my private server
body:
# What is this?

A small, lightweight modpack, based on Create and some addons, that I made for my private server. 

This modpack is essentially just a collection of mods, with very few personalisation. Do not expect custom recipes or something similar. If you want a ready-to-go Create modpack, however, this might be a nice pick for you.

# Ok, but what can you do with these mods?
The Create mod is a steampunk-esque tech mod centred on automation and aestethics. What I think makes it stand out is the way Create blocks and machines work: instead of just plopping down a single block or a pre-made multiblock structure, you have to design and assemble said structures with the tools given by the mod. The possibilities are endless: you can make an hyper-compact tree farm, a nice, good-looking railway station or a funny, quirky sorting system where items fly all over the places. It's up to you.

To complement the mod I've added quite some addons that expand the core gamplay (with a focus on train since I like them). I've also decided to include Terralith for a better worldgen and Supplementaries to beautify my builds. Finally, there are many, many performance mods, else I fry my laptop

**DISCLAIMER**: I am not a modder and I don't know what I am doing. If you notice something that you think I could do better feel free to let me know.

## Credits
- Sleepable Create  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleepable-create
